description: A folk art-style painting depicting a snowy New England village in winter. The scene shows a rolling landscape blanketed in white snow, with several farmhouses and buildings scattered across the hillside. A yellow house with a red door stands prominently at left. People engage in various winter activities — children play in the snow, figures walk along paths, a horse-drawn sleigh crosses a small stone bridge over a frozen stream. Dogs, sheep, and other animals are visible. Bare trees dot the landscape, and blue-gray mountains rise in the background under a dramatic dark-clouded winter sky.
